meta.title: AMANA — Treasury Orchestration for Mantle
meta.description: 3 AI agents under a verifiable on-chain policy allocate idle stablecoins across Mantle's RWA stack.

hero.eyebrow: MANTLE TURING TEST HACKATHON 2026 · AI × RWA
hero.title: Treasury Orchestration for the Mantle RWA Stack
hero.subtitle: AMANA composes Allocator, Risk, and Reporter agents under a Skills-First policy. Every decision is signed by an ERC-8004 agent identity NFT, recorded permanently on Mantle.

allocator.title: Allocator Agent
allocator.body: Reasons across USDY, mUSD, Aave V3 supply, and MI4 yields under your policy. Caps, risk tolerance, liquidity floors — all enforced before any tx.

risk.title: Risk Agent
risk.body: Watches peg drift, oracle deviation, drawdown breach. Triggers defensive exit in ≤2 minutes — replicates March 10 wstETH glitch as a test case.

reporter.title: Reporter Agent
reporter.body: Weekly P&L vs do-nothing baseline. Outperformance in basis points. Compliance CSV export. Every decision attested on ERC-8004.

howItWorks.title: From deposit to allocated in 30 seconds.
howItWorks.step1Body: Embedded wallet via Privy. No MetaMask popup. Email + social login welcome.
howItWorks.step2Body: Allocator reads live APYs, applies your policy, proposes weights with on-chain reasoning hash.
howItWorks.step3Body: You sign once. Vault routes across 4 Mantle assets. ERC-8004 attestation emitted.

counters.title: Built on Mantle's $4B+ RWA Stack.
counters.subtitle: AMANA composes the primitives that already work.

footer.tagline: Treasury orchestration as a primitive, not a dashboard.
footer.builtBy: Built by Devrangga Hazza Mahiswara · UGM '23 · Yogyakarta, Indonesia
footer.hackathon: Mantle Turing Test Hackathon 2026 · AI × RWA Track
